name: ECharts
comment:
This is a [ECharts](http://echarts.baidu.com/) chart option types
collection and a helper to use
[ECharts WebComponent](https://github.com/kkpoon/echarts-webcomponent).


## Why Web Component?

Please watch [this](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ar3TakwE8o0&t=1s)
video about Elm and Web Components by Richard Feldman


# Definitions

@docs ChartType


# Helpers

@docs toJsonString

values.name: toJsonString
values.comment:
convert the chart option to a string of json, which could apply to the
[echarts-webcomponent](https://github.com/kkpoon/echarts-webcomponent) `option`
attribute

name: ECharts.PieChart

aliases.name: PieChartOption
aliases.comment: describe the chart option of pie chart
aliases.type: { title : Maybe TitleOption, tooltip : Maybe TooltipOption, legend : Maybe LegendOption, series : Maybe (List PieSeriesOption) }

aliases.name: PieSeriesOption
aliases.type: { name : Maybe String, legendHoverLink : Maybe Bool, hoverAnimation : Maybe Bool, selectedMode : Maybe SelectedMode, selectedOffset : Maybe Int, clockwise : Maybe Bool, startAngle : Maybe Float, minAngle : Maybe Float, roseType : Maybe Bool, avoidLabelOverlap : Maybe Bool, stillShowZeroSum : Maybe Bool, radius : Maybe ( String, String ), center : Maybe ( String, String ), itemStyle : Maybe { emphasis : Maybe { shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String } }, data : Maybe (List { value : Float, name : String }) }

values.name: defaultPieChartOption
values.comment:
create a pie chart option of for default value

This function creates an All-Nothing TitleOption.
[ECharts](https://ecomfe.github.io/echarts-doc/public/en/option.html)
applies the default value when the option attribute is not specified.

values.name: defaultPieSeriesOption
values.comment:
create a pie chart series option of for default value

This function creates an All-Nothing TitleOption.
[ECharts](https://ecomfe.github.io/echarts-doc/public/en/option.html)
applies the default value when the option attribute is not specified.

values.name: encodePieChartOption
values.comment: encode the pie chart option to Json.Encode.Value

name: ECharts.BarChart

aliases.name: BarChartOption
aliases.comment: describe the chart option of Bar chart
aliases.type: { title : Maybe TitleOption, tooltip : Maybe TooltipOption, legend : Maybe LegendOption, xAxis : Maybe XAxisOption, yAxis : Maybe YAxisOption, series : Maybe (List BarSeriesOption) }

aliases.name: BarSeriesOption
aliases.type: { name : Maybe String, barGap : Maybe Int, data : Maybe (List { value : Float }) }

values.name: defaultBarChartOption
values.comment:
create a Bar chart option of for default value

This function creates an All-Nothing TitleOption.
[ECharts](https://ecomfe.github.io/echarts-doc/public/en/option.html)
applies the default value when the option attribute is not specified.

values.name: defaultBarSeriesOption
values.comment:
create a Bar chart series option of for default value

This function creates an All-Nothing TitleOption.
[ECharts](https://ecomfe.github.io/echarts-doc/public/en/option.html)
applies the default value when the option attribute is not specified.

values.name: encodeBarChartOption
values.comment: encode the Bar chart option to Json.Encode.Value

name: ECharts.Style

unions.name: HorizontalAlignment
unions.comment: describe horizontal alignment: left, center, right

unions.name: VerticalAlignment
unions.comment: describe vertical alignment: top, middle, bottom

aliases.name: CrossStyleOption
aliases.type: { color : Maybe String, width : Maybe Int, type_ : Maybe LineStyleType, shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetY : Maybe Int, opacity : Maybe Float, textStyle : Maybe TextStyleOption }

aliases.name: LegendOption
aliases.type: { show : Maybe Bool, zlevel : Maybe Int, z : Maybe Int, left : Maybe String, top : Maybe String, right : Maybe String, bottom : Maybe String, width : Maybe String, height : Maybe String, orient : Maybe Orientation, align : Maybe LegendAlignment, padding : Maybe Spacing, itemGap : Maybe Int, itemWidth : Maybe Int, itemHeight : Maybe Int, formatter : Maybe String, selectedMode : Maybe SelectedMode, inactiveColor : Maybe String, selected : Maybe (List ( String, Bool )), textStyle : Maybe TextStyleOption, tooltip : Maybe TooltipOption, data : Maybe (List { name : String, icon : String, textStyle : TextStyleOption }), backgroundColor : Maybe String, borderColor : Maybe String, borderWidth : Maybe Int, shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetY : Maybe Int }

aliases.name: LineStyleOption
aliases.type: { color : Maybe String, width : Maybe Int, type_ : Maybe LineStyleType, shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetY : Maybe Int, opacity : Maybe Float }

aliases.name: ShadowStyleOption
aliases.type: { color : Maybe String, shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetY : Maybe Int, opacity : Maybe Float }

aliases.name: TextStyleOption
aliases.type: { color : Maybe String, fontStyle : Maybe String, fontWeight : Maybe String, fontFamily : Maybe String, fontSize : Maybe Float, lineHeight : Maybe Float, rich : Maybe RichOption }

aliases.name: TitleOption
aliases.type: { show : Maybe Bool, text : Maybe String, link : Maybe String, target : Maybe String, textStyle : Maybe TextStyleOption, textAlign : Maybe HorizontalAlignment, textBaseline : Maybe VerticalAlignment, subtext : Maybe String, sublink : Maybe String, subtarget : Maybe String, subtextStyle : Maybe TextStyleOption, padding : Maybe Spacing, itemGap : Maybe Float, zlevel : Maybe Int, z : Maybe Int, left : Maybe String, top : Maybe String, right : Maybe String, bottom : Maybe String, backgroundColor : Maybe String, borderColor : Maybe String, borderWidth : Maybe String, shadowBlur : Maybe Int, shadowColor : Maybe String, shadowOffsetX : Maybe Int, shadowOffsetY : Maybe Int }

aliases.name: TooltipAxisPointerOption
aliases.type: { type_ : Maybe TooltipAxisPointerType, axis : Maybe String, animation : Maybe Bool, animationThreshold : Maybe Int, animationDuration : Maybe Int, animationEasing : Maybe AnimationEasing, animationDelay : Maybe Int, animationDurationUpdate : Maybe Int, animationEasingUpdate : Maybe AnimationEasing, animationDelayUpdate : Maybe Int, lineStyle : Maybe LineStyleOption, crossStyle : Maybe CrossStyleOption, shadowStyle : Maybe ShadowStyleOption }

aliases.name: TooltipOption
aliases.type: { show : Maybe Bool, showContent : Maybe Bool, trigger : Maybe TooltipTrigger, triggerOn : Maybe TooltipTriggerOn, alwaysShowContent : Maybe Bool, showDelay : Maybe Int, hideDelay : Maybe Int, enterable : Maybe Bool, position : Maybe TooltipPosition, confine : Maybe Bool, transitionDuration : Maybe Float, formatter : Maybe String, backgroundColor : Maybe String, borderColor : Maybe String, borderWidth : Maybe String, padding : Maybe Spacing, textStyle : Maybe TextStyleOption, extraCssText : Maybe String, axisPointer : Maybe TooltipAxisPointerOption, data : Maybe (List { date : String, value : Float, name : String }) }

aliases.name: XAxisOption
aliases.type: { show : Maybe Bool, type_ : Maybe String, data : Maybe (List { value : String, textStyle : TextStyleOption }) }

aliases.name: YAxisOption
aliases.type: { show : Maybe Bool, type_ : Maybe String, data : Maybe (List { value : String, textStyle : TextStyleOption }) }
